name: Tatlıses Çiğ Köfte
address: Mustafa Kemal Bulvarı, Mimaroba Mahallesi, Mimaroba Mahallesi, Büyükçekmece

faq.question: How much does it cost?
faq.answer: Orta fiyatlıdır, kişi başı yaklaşık 300-600 TL.

faq.question: Where is it?

faq.question: Is reservation available?
faq.answer: Reservations are not accepted.

faq.question: What are the popular dishes?
faq.answer: Lahmacun, Çiğ Köfte, Menemen Lahmacun ve İskender Lahmacun gibi lezzetler sunuyoruz.

faq.answer: Vegan seçeneğimiz yok.
